catalyst_window: August 2026 [external estimate, not in our data context; exact announcement date not available in our data]

rightIf_verification.original_text: 1H26 revenue growth YoY < 5% AND operating margin compresses below 10.0%
Broker EPS revisions begin trending down from current 1.24-1.76 range, with 2+ brokers cutting targets within 2 weeks of 1H26 print
Margin financing balance declines >10% from 2.3亿 in the 30 days post-print (leveraged-long unwind)
Price breaks ¥18.0 chip cluster (16.28% of float) on volume, opening path to ¥17.5 then ¥16.78
Net store-count growth disclosed below 5% YoY (per watchlist wrongIf threshold)

wrongIf_verification.original_text: 1H26 revenue growth YoY ≥6% AND op margin held ≥10.5% — validating dual-drive thesis
Price breaks above ¥19.5 chip cluster on volume, clearing 64% of overhead supply
Management announces share buyback program, signaling cash-flow comfort despite expansion
Same-store sales growth disclosed at >3% YoY — proves expansion is demand-led not cost-only
Broker target upgrades continue with 2+ houses raising targets within 30 days of the print

what_changes_our_mind: 1H26 print showing BOTH revenue growth ≥6% YoY AND operating margin maintained ≥10.5% — proving expansion costs are absorbed without margin compression while top-line re-accelerates
_methodology_note: MVP scaffold: this record carries the wrongIf/rightIf as PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW. When the catalyst event occurs (e.g., 2026-08-28 BYD Q2 print), a human (Junyan) or future automated NLP/data-integration pass should mark each condition as TRIGGERED | NOT_TRIGGERED | INCONCLUSIVE with evidence. Once all conditions resolved, set verified_final_outcome to compute hit rate into outcomes_summary.
